site.title: Zeni | Money tracked without the friction
site.description: A personal finance tracker built for people who want clarity without complexity. It removes the hassle of tracking your money, so you can focus on understanding it.

hero.headline: Money tracked
hero.sub: Type "coffee 4.50", snap a receipt, or just ask - Zeni understands. Record any transaction in seconds.

mockup.aiNote: AI understood: team lunch, grouped expense

features.sectionSub: A privacy-first finance tracker built for people who want clarity without complexity.

commandBar.title: ⌘ K to log anything
commandBar.body: One command bar to record income, spending, recurring bills, grouped expenses, or multiple transactions at once. Using AI, Zeni infers context, categorizes with high detail, and fills in the blanks.
list: AI infers context and categorizes automatically

receipt.title: Receipt & invoice scanning
receipt.body: Upload a photo of a paper receipt or a PDF e-invoice. The AI reads the total, line items, merchant, and date, then records it for you.

chat.title: Chat with your data
chat.body: Ask anything in plain language, like chatting with a personal finance advisor. Get real answers from your actual numbers.
chat.bubbleUser: How much have I earned in total this month?
chat.bubbleAi: You've earned $4,320 this month across 3 income sources. Your biggest expense category is Dining at $496.

models.title: Model agnostic
models.body: Bring your own API key. Zeni works with OpenAI, OpenRouter, Anthropic, and Google Gemini.

voice.title: Voice input
voice.body: Tap the mic and speak your expense. Audio is processed locally, nothing leaves your server.
voice.detail: Local audio processing · No data sent to third parties

wallets.title: Multiple wallets
wallets.body: Separate personal, business, travel, or shared expenses across wallets. Each wallet has its own currency, history, and analytics - perfect for people living across borders.

categories.title: Categories & tags
categories.body: Organize expenses with categories and tags. The AI suggests both automatically based on context, reducing your input to near zero. Filter by either when reviewing your history.

mcp.title: MCP & API
mcp.body: Connect Zeni to your favorite AI agents via MCP, or integrate with third-party tools using your personal API key.
mcp.detail: MCP server · REST API · Bring your own agents

budgets.title: Budgets
budgets.body: Set budgets by period, category, or wallet. Get a visual warning right on the dashboard when you are close to or exceeding your limit.

dashboard.title: Dashboard at a glance
dashboard.body: Monthly total, weekly pace, daily average, recent transactions, and a category breakdown chart.

privacy.title: Your data stays
privacy.sub: Self-host Zeni so all your personal finance data lives on your own disk. No tracking, no ads, and no subscription fees.
checklist: All data stored locally on your own server
Bring your own AI provider - OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, OpenRouter

cta.title: Start tracking
cta.sub: Self-host with Docker Compose for full control, or use the hosted instance free (data only stored for 2 weeks).
